overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a character walking through a dystopian industrial city at night in the rain. The scene features wet streets reflecting orange sodium lights and teal neon, with large concrete structures and overpasses. The character transitions from a narrow sidewalk to an open plaza under a bridge, eventually following another pedestrian up a sloped street.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk beneath overhead pipes and scaffolding

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete sidewalk next to a high concrete barrier wall

entered.detail: tall concrete retaining wall running along the left side of the sidewalk
metal scaffolding and ladder structures attached to the wall
tall street lamps emitting warm orange sodium light
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting the orange lights
large metal pipes and structural beams crossing overhead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow industrial sidewalk at night, flanked by a high concrete barrier wall on the left and a street on the right. Orange sodium street lights illuminate the rain-slicked pavement, while overhead industrial pipes and scaffolding create a confined, dystopian atmosphere. No other pedestrians are visible in this industrial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: large covered plaza beneath highway overpass

events.description: exiting narrow sidewalk into wide open plaza area under the overpass
digital billboard becomes visible on the right wall of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking into the expansive covered plaza beneath the massive concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: small group of pedestrians standing near the far wall of the plaza

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway overpass spanning the entire plaza
illuminated advertisement screen mounted on the right wall displaying colorful graphics
wide open concrete space beneath the overpass with scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast plaza sheltered beneath a massive highway overpass. The concrete barrier wall and scaffolding give way to an open space dominated by the bridge structure overhead. A digital billboard glows on the right wall, and a few distant pedestrians become visible as the character enters this transitional space between the narrow sidewalk and the open street beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: sloped city street leading up from the plaza

events.description: begins following a pedestrian in a red and yellow jacket up the sloped street

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian wearing a bright red and yellow jacket up the sloped wet street away from the plaza

notable_agents.action: person in red and yellow jacket walking up the sloped street ahead of ego

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing lines on the wet asphalt
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
inclined street leading upward with visible slope

segments.scene_description: Exiting the plaza, the character crosses a marked crosswalk and begins ascending a sloped street. The environment shifts to an open road with graffiti-covered walls on the left. The character follows a pedestrian wearing a distinctive red and yellow jacket up the hill, moving away from the overpass into a more open industrial street lined with parked vehicles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that gradually opens into a wide urban plaza and then ascends a sloped city street. It begins beside a high concrete barrier wall and overhead scaffolding, where orange sodium lights reflect off the rain-slicked pavement of a narrow sidewalk. As the character moves forward, the confined space expands into a vast plaza sheltered beneath a massive highway overpass, where the oppressive walls give way to an open area illuminated by a glowing digital billboard. The scene then shifts as the character exits the plaza and crosses a marked crosswalk, transitioning from the shelter of the bridge to an open road lined with graffiti-covered walls and parked vehicles. Finally, the camera follows a pedestrian in a red and yellow jacket up a sloped street, moving away from the overpass and deeper into the industrial district.
